title: Microsoft Built an AI Agent That Works While You Sleep
script: AI chatbots wait for you to ask. Microsoft Scout doesn't. Scout is Microsoft's first Autopilot agent — it runs continuously on your Windows 11 PC or Mac with its own Microsoft work identity through Entra ID. It reads your files, joins your calendar, tracks your tasks, and acts autonomously. No prompts needed. Microsoft says this is what AI was always supposed to become: not a tool, but a coworker.
